goal: Найти один или несколько ортогональных specialist-сигналов или conditioning-слоёв, которые работают там, где база active-signal-v1@1 не торгует, и доказанно приносят новые входы, а не скрытый дубляж.
global_constraints: База active-signal-v1@1 immutable — не ретюнить, не менять пороги, часы, дни, исполнение.
Сырые event-entry конструкции (один event + один фильтр) запрещены — H1/H2 тупик.
Каждый кандидат сначала проходит complement-first режим: вход только на base_absent anchor-барах.
Single-filter entry запрещён — минимум три логических слоя (новый слой + подтверждение режима + ограничитель плотности).
Model-first запрещён до завершения Wave A (low-friction).
Кандидат отклоняется, если strict additive слабый, а permissive сильный — признак скрытого каннибализма.

slices.title: Cannibalization, ownership и new-entry proof
slices.hypothesis: Formally prove that each integration candidate brings genuinely new trades and new profit, not cannibalized base entries.
slices.objective: Formally prove that each integration candidate brings genuinely new trades and new profit, not cannibalized base entries.
success_criteria: Direct proof exists for which candidates genuinely expand the system.
evidence_requirements: Direct proof exists for which candidates genuinely expand the system.

slices.title: Wave B — medium-friction branch
slices.hypothesis: Explore cross-symbol leadership, model-backed compression/routing, and event-state-model hybrids only if Wave A failed to produce conclusive candidates.
slices.objective: Explore cross-symbol leadership, model-backed compression/routing, and event-state-model hybrids only if Wave A failed to produce conclusive candidates.
success_criteria: Wave B branches evaluated for readiness; started branches follow the same strict specialist pipeline.
evidence_requirements: Wave B branches evaluated for readiness; started branches follow the same strict specialist pipeline.

slices.title: Walk-forward и финальный отбор
slices.hypothesis: Run walk-forward validation on all surviving candidates and produce a final honest verdict on whether a new additive layer was found.
slices.objective: Run walk-forward validation on all surviving candidates and produce a final honest verdict on whether a new additive layer was found.
success_criteria: Walk-forward completed for all finalists, honest final verdict recorded, operational checklist fully signed off.
evidence_requirements: Walk-forward completed for all finalists, honest final verdict recorded, operational checklist fully signed off.
